tasks.name: kdp publishing
tasks:
Book Details

Language: English
Book Title: The Nervous System Reset
Subtitle: A Step-by-Step Guide to Getting Out of Survival Mode and Back to Yourself
Series: No
Edition Number: leave blank
Author: Deb Maness
Contributors: leave blank unless you want to add editor/designer
Description:
Why does your body still feel overwhelmed even when you are trying so hard to hold everything together?

If you feel exhausted, overstimulated, emotionally reactive, numb, burned out, or stuck in survival mode, this book will help you understand why and show you what to do next.

The Nervous System Reset is a practical, compassionate guide for people who feel like stress has taken over their body, sleep, emotions, and daily life. Instead of vague advice or unrealistic routines, this book offers clear, step-by-step support for calming your nervous system, understanding your overload patterns, and getting back to yourself.

Inside, you will learn how to:
- recognize the hidden signs of nervous system dysregulation
- understand why you feel stuck in survival mode
- calm spirals, hyperarousal, and emotional overload
- improve sleep and manage the 3 a.m. wake-up
- recover from burnout, shutdown, and post-crisis crashes
- use practical tools that actually work in real life
- create a life that feels safer, steadier, and less overwhelming

This is not about becoming perfect, endlessly calm, or emotionally flat. It is about learning how to work with your body instead of fighting it, so you can feel more grounded, more resilient, and more like yourself again.

If everything feels like too much, this book will help you understand why and begin the reset.
Publishing Rights: I own the copyright and I hold necessary publishing rights
Keywords:
nervous system reset
survival mode
nervous system regulation
burnout recovery
stress relief for women
how to calm anxiety
healing from overwhelm
Categories
Pick 3 if available. Best choices:

SELF-HELP / Stress Management

Tone: compassionate, practical, grounded
Promise: step-by-step help for calming the body and getting out of survival mode

tasks.task:
OVERALL INSTRUCTION: This is a multi-step workflow. You must process this ONE MODULE AT A TIME. Do NOT attempt to fill or plan for Module 2 until you have completely finished and saved Module 1 and issued a NOTE confirming it. Do not attempt to click Next or Submit until all 3 modules are completely filled and saved.

go here and login if needed then go to amazon a plus content select amazon.com then we are going to create 3 modules here they are Here are 3 highly optimized, conversion-driven Amazon A+ Content modules designed to dominate the "nervous system," "burnout," and "stress relief" categories. VERY IMPORTANT WHEN YOU ADD THE IMAGE ALSO OONLY ADD A SHORT SENTENCE 100 CHARACTERS OR LESS DO NOT ADD THE TEXT FOR MODULE
Module 1: Standard Image Header with Text (The Emotional Hook) ----- All images need alt text and tags - just read the text that goes into the module and formulate 100 char alt text and tags for all the images as you upload them

This module acts as your hero banner. It validates the reader’s hidden struggle and introduces the book as the ultimate, compassionate solution.
Suggested Image: A calming, high-quality lifestyle image of a woman or man holding a warm mug, looking out a window, or a beautiful mockup of the book cover on a cozy bedside table.
Image Alt-Text (Backend SEO): Nervous system regulation book for burnout recovery, high functioning anxiety relief, and overcoming survival mode.
Headline: Are You High-Functioning on the Outside, But Exhausted on the Inside?
IMPORTANT:TAGS ARE ENTERED ONE AT A TIME ENTER TAG AND THEN HIT PLUS BUTTON
Body Text:
There is a kind of tired that sleep cannot fix. You hit your deadlines, care for your family, and look incredibly capable to the outside world. But inside, you feel braced, snappy, foggy, or numb. You are running on the fumes of "survival mode," wondering why simple things suddenly feel so heavy.
In The Nervous System Reset, author Deb Maness reveals a life-changing truth: your overwhelm is not a moral failing. It is a physiological response.
When you live with chronic stress, caregiving demands, or hidden burnout, you cannot "self-improve" your way to peace. You don't need another rigid morning routine or toxic productivity hack. You need a gentler map. This book is your practical, shame-free guide to calming a wired-and-tired body, escaping functional freeze, and building a life your nervous system can actually trust.
Bullet Points (Optimized for Readability & SEO):
Stop the Shame Spiral: Learn why you can't just "relax" and how to decode the hidden physical signs of emotional overload.
State Over Strategy: Discover why traditional self-help fails when your body is in fight, flight, or shutdown.
For the Chronically Overextended: Perfect for caregivers, burned-out professionals, overthinkers, and anyone who feels like they have zero margin left.
Module 2: Standard 3-Image & Text (The Core Pillars / Features)
This module breaks down the book’s unique concepts into three visual columns, targeting long-tail keywords like "3 AM wake ups," "functional freeze," and "somatic healing."
Column 1:
Suggested Image: A clock showing 3:00 AM next to a dimly lit lamp, or someone resting their head on a pillow.
Image Alt-Text: Cure 3 AM wake ups, insomnia, and hyperarousal with somatic nervous system reset techniques.
Header: Solve the 3 A.M. Wake-Up
Body Text:
Are you exhausted all day but suddenly wired at bedtime? Discover why your body's stress response peaks after dark. Learn how to soothe hyperarousal, release "sleep debt," and safely transition your body from high-alert patrol mode into deep, restorative rest—without relying on forced sleep hygiene rules that only cause more anxiety.
Column 2:
Suggested Image: A person gently holding their chest, practicing somatic grounding, or walking peacefully in nature.
Image Alt-Text: Overcome functional freeze, burnout, and emotional numbness with gentle somatic practices and trauma-informed care.
Header: Escape "Functional Freeze"
Body Text:
Not all stress looks like a panic attack. Sometimes it looks like a total shutdown. If you are struggling with procrastination, doomscrolling, emotional flatness, or the dreaded "Crash After the Crisis," you will learn how to safely wake up your nervous system. Find small, realistic ways to move stress through your body using warmth, rhythm, and gentle sensory regulation.
Column 3:
Suggested Image: A beautiful, open notebook showing a checklist, paired with a cup of tea.
Image Alt-Text: 14-day nervous system reset workbook, practical boundaries, and stress management for adults.
Header: The 14-Day Practical Reset
Body Text:
Healing doesn't require a month-long wellness retreat. It happens in the quiet moments of your actual, messy life. Master the art of the "Minimum Viable Day," build a personalized regulation menu, learn to set regulating boundaries without guilt, and utilize the included 14-Day Nervous System Reset to create tiny, daily shifts that pull you out of overwhelm.
Module 3: Standard Single Image & Sidebar (The "Why It Works" Differentiator)
This module seals the deal by addressing the buyer's hesitation: "Will this actually work for my crazy life?" It focuses on the book's realistic, anti-hustle approach.
Suggested Image: A graphic featuring a quote from the book, such as: "Healing is not a performance. You do not have to look serene to do deep work." overlaid on a calming, minimalist background.
Image Alt-Text: Compassionate guide to somatic healing, managing chronic stress, and building a regulated nervous system.
Headline: Why Good Tools Fail (And What to Do Instead)
Body Text:
If you’ve ever tried deep breathing, journaling, or meditation only to feel more anxious and trapped in your own body, you are not broken. You were just using the wrong tool for your nervous system's current state.
The Nervous System Reset is radically different because it doesn't ask you to be perfect. It asks you to be honest. It teaches you how to match your coping tools to your body’s actual needs—whether you need grounding to calm a panic spiral, warmth to thaw out of a burnout shutdown, or a simple boundary to protect yourself from relational strain.
Inside, you will discover:
The 7 Levers of Regulation: Why regulation is about movement, sensory input, and nourishment—not just breathing.
Body Literacy: How to distinguish between intuition, standard anxiety, and a full nervous system overload.
The Post-Crisis Crash: Why you suddenly fall apart after the stressful event ends, and how to recover gently.
Scripts for Survival Mode: Exact words to use when you are spiraling, setting boundaries, or dealing with people who drain your capacity.
Your body is not your enemy—it is trying to protect you. Stop fighting it, and start coming back to yourself.
💡 Pro-Tips for Maximizing This A+ Content on Amazon:
Backend Search Terms: When uploading your book, use these exact backend keywords: somatic healing workbook, high functioning anxiety relief, burnout recovery for women, vagus nerve regulation, highly sensitive person, chronic stress management, functional freeze, trauma informed self care.
Use Real Text, Not Just Images: Ensure you copy/paste the text above into the actual text boxes in Amazon's A+ builder. Do not bake the text into the images. Amazon's A9 search algorithm crawls the actual text in A+ modules for SEO ranking.
Image Formatting: Keep your images cohesive in color palette (warm, grounding, earthy tones like sage green, soft blues, and warm beige) to mirror the "calming" promise of the book. ---- I have added the images labeled below
